mapper.select: SELECT e.category, SUM(e.amount) AS total_amount FROM expense e WHERE e.trip_id = #{tripId} GROUP BY e.category ORDER BY total_amount DESC

SELECT e.payer_id AS member_id, m2.nickname AS nickname, SUM(e.amount) AS paid_amount FROM expense e JOIN member2 m2 ON m2.member_id = e.payer_id WHERE e.trip_id = #{tripId} GROUP BY e.payer_id, m2.nickname ORDER BY paid_amount DESC

SELECT ep.member_id, m2.nickname, SUM(ep.share_amount) AS share_amount, 0 AS balance FROM expense_participant ep JOIN expense e ON e.expense_id = ep.expense_id JOIN member2 m2 ON m2.member_id = ep.member_id WHERE e.trip_id = #{tripId} GROUP BY ep.member_id, m2.nickname ORDER BY share_amount DESC

WITH /* 각 멤버가 실제로 결제한 금액 합계 */ paid AS ( SELECT e.payer_id AS member_id, SUM(e.amount) AS paid_amount FROM expense e WHERE e.trip_id = #{tripId} GROUP BY e.payer_id ), /* 각 멤버가 부담해야 하는 금액 합계 (외부 인원 제외) */ shared AS ( SELECT ep.member_id, SUM(ep.share_amount) AS share_amount FROM expense_participant ep JOIN expense e ON e.expense_id = ep.expense_id WHERE e.trip_id = #{tripId} AND ep.member_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ep.member_id ), /* 여행 참여 멤버 전체 (ACCEPTED 상태만) */ members AS ( SELECT DISTINCT tm.member_id FROM trip_member tm WHERE tm.trip_id = #{tripId} AND tm.invitation_status = 'ACCEPTED' ) SELECT m.member_id, m2.nickname, NVL(p.paid_amount, 0) AS paid_amount, NVL(s.share_amount, 0) AS share_amount, NVL(p.paid_amount, 0) - NVL(s.share_amount, 0) AS balance FROM members m JOIN member2 m2 ON m2.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN paid p ON p.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN shared s ON s.member_id = m.member_id ORDER BY balance DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT e.expense_id, e.trip_id, e.payer_id, m2.nickname AS payer_nickname, e.category, e.amount, e.description, e.expense_date, e.payment_type, e.created_at, /* ★ 정산 상태 판단 (settlement_expense_link 연동) */ CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM settlement_expense_link sel JOIN settlement s ON sel.batch_id = s.batch_id WHERE sel.expense_id = e.expense_id AND s.status = 'COMPLETED' ) THEN 'SETTLED' WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM settlement_expense_link sel JOIN settlement s ON sel.batch_id = s.batch_id WHERE sel.expense_id = e.expense_id AND s.status IN ('PENDING','REQUESTED') ) THEN 'PENDING' ELSE 'UNSETTLED' END AS settle_status, /* ★ 완료된 batch_id (SETTLED인 경우) */ (SELECT MIN(sel2.batch_id) FROM settlement_expense_link sel2 JOIN settlement s2 ON sel2.batch_id = s2.batch_id WHERE sel2.expense_id = e.expense_id AND s2.status = 'COMPLETED') AS settled_batch_id, ROWNUM AS rn FROM expense e JOIN member2 m2 ON m2.member_id = e.payer_id WHERE e.trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY e.expense_date DESC, e.created_at DESC ) WHERE rn > #{offset} AND rn <= #{offset} + #{limit}

SELECT e.expense_id, e.trip_id, e.payer_id, m2.nickname AS payer_nickname, e.category, e.amount, e.description, e.expense_date, e.receipt_url, e.payment_type, e.memo, e.created_at FROM expense e JOIN member2 m2 ON m2.member_id = e.payer_id WHERE e.expense_id = #{expenseId}

SELECT ep.participant_id, ep.member_id, m2.nickname AS member_nickname, ep.nickname AS ext_nickname, COALESCE(m2.nickname, ep.nickname) AS display_name, ep.share_amount FROM expense_participant ep LEFT JOIN member2 m2 ON m2.member_id = ep.member_id WHERE ep.expense_id = #{expenseId} ORDER BY ep.participant_id

SELECT s.settlement_id, s.trip_id, s.from_member_id, fm.nickname AS from_nickname, s.to_member_id, tm.nickname AS to_nickname, s.amount, s.status, s.batch_id, s.settled_at, s.created_at FROM settlement s LEFT JOIN member2 fm ON fm.member_id = s.from_member_id LEFT JOIN member2 tm ON tm.member_id = s.to_member_id WHERE s.trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY s.status ASC, s.amount DESC

SELECT s.settlement_id, s.trip_id, s.from_member_id, fm.nickname AS from_nickname, s.to_member_id, tm.nickname AS to_nickname, s.amount, s.status, s.batch_id, s.settled_at, s.created_at FROM settlement s LEFT JOIN member2 fm ON fm.member_id = s.from_member_id LEFT JOIN member2 tm ON tm.member_id = s.to_member_id WHERE s.trip_id = #{tripId} AND (s.from_member_id = #{memberId} OR s.to_member_id = #{memberId}) ORDER BY s.status ASC, s.amount DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO settlement ( settlement_id, trip_id, to_member_id, from_member_id, amount, status, created_at ) VALUES ( settlement_seq.NEXTVAL, #{tripId}, #{toMemberId}, #{fromMemberId}, #{amount}, 'REQUESTED', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO trip_notification ( notification_id, trip_id, receiver_id, sender_id, message, type, is_read, created_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_NOTIFICATION.NEXTVAL, #{tripId}, #{receiverId}, #{senderId}, #{message}, #{type}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT e.category, SUM(e.amount) AS total_amount FROM expense e WHERE e.trip_id = #{tripId} AND e.payer_id = #{memberId} GROUP BY e.category ORDER BY total_amount DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT e.expense_id, e.trip_id, e.payer_id, m2.nickname AS payer_nickname, e.category, e.amount, e.description, e.expense_date, e.payment_type, e.created_at FROM expense e JOIN member2 m2 ON m2.member_id = e.payer_id WHERE e.trip_id = #{tripId} AND e.payer_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY e.expense_date DESC, e.created_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT s.settlement_id, s.trip_id, s.from_member_id, fm.nickname AS from_nickname, s.to_member_id, tm.nickname AS to_nickname, s.amount, s.status, s.batch_id, s.settled_at, s.created_at FROM settlement s LEFT JOIN member2 fm ON fm.member_id = s.from_member_id LEFT JOIN member2 tm ON tm.member_id = s.to_member_id WHERE s.trip_id = #{tripId} AND s.batch_id = #{batchId} ORDER BY s.amount DESC

SELECT e.expense_id, e.trip_id, e.payer_id, m2.nickname AS payer_nickname, e.category, e.amount, e.description, e.expense_date, e.receipt_url, e.payment_type, e.memo, e.created_at FROM expense e JOIN settlement_expense_link sel ON sel.expense_id = e.expense_id JOIN member2 m2 ON m2.member_id = e.payer_id WHERE sel.batch_id = #{batchId} AND sel.trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY e.expense_date ASC, e.created_at ASC

WITH batch_expenses AS ( SELECT sel.expense_id FROM settlement_expense_link sel WHERE sel.batch_id = #{batchId} AND sel.trip_id = #{tripId} ), paid AS ( SELECT e.payer_id AS member_id, SUM(e.amount) AS paid_amount FROM expense e WHERE e.expense_id IN (SELECT expense_id FROM batch_expenses) GROUP BY e.payer_id ), shared AS ( SELECT ep.member_id, SUM(ep.share_amount) AS share_amount FROM expense_participant ep WHERE ep.expense_id IN (SELECT expense_id FROM batch_expenses) AND ep.member_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ep.member_id ), members AS ( SELECT DISTINCT tm.member_id FROM trip_member tm WHERE tm.trip_id = #{tripId} AND tm.invitation_status = 'ACCEPTED' ) SELECT m.member_id, m2.nickname, NVL(p.paid_amount, 0) AS paid_amount, NVL(s.share_amount, 0) AS share_amount, NVL(p.paid_amount, 0) - NVL(s.share_amount, 0) AS balance FROM members m JOIN member2 m2 ON m2.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN paid p ON p.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN shared s ON s.member_id = m.member_id WHERE (p.paid_amount IS NOT NULL OR s.share_amount IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY balance DESC
SELECT DISTINCT sel.expense_id FROM settlement_expense_link sel JOIN settlement s ON sel.batch_id = s.batch_id WHERE sel.trip_id = #{tripId} AND s.status = 'COMPLETED'

WITH settled_expenses AS ( SELECT DISTINCT sel.expense_id FROM settlement_expense_link sel JOIN settlement s ON sel.batch_id = s.batch_id WHERE sel.trip_id = #{tripId} AND s.status = 'COMPLETED' ), paid AS ( SELECT e.payer_id AS member_id, SUM(e.amount) AS paid_amount FROM expense e WHERE e.trip_id = #{tripId} AND e.expense_id NOT IN (SELECT expense_id FROM settled_expenses) GROUP BY e.payer_id ), shared AS ( SELECT ep.member_id, SUM(ep.share_amount) AS share_amount FROM expense_participant ep JOIN expense e ON e.expense_id = ep.expense_id WHERE e.trip_id = #{tripId} AND ep.member_id IS NOT NULL AND e.expense_id NOT IN (SELECT expense_id FROM settled_expenses) GROUP BY ep.member_id ), members AS ( SELECT DISTINCT tm.member_id FROM trip_member tm WHERE tm.trip_id = #{tripId} AND tm.invitation_status = 'ACCEPTED' ) SELECT m.member_id, m2.nickname, NVL(p.paid_amount, 0) AS paid_amount, NVL(s.share_amount, 0) AS share_amount, NVL(p.paid_amount, 0) - NVL(s.share_amount, 0) AS balance FROM members m JOIN member2 m2 ON m2.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN paid p ON p.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN shared s ON s.member_id = m.member_id WHERE (p.paid_amount IS NOT NULL OR s.share_amount IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY balance DESC
